subparts.text: Give a very brief account of the influence of geography, climate and light in Greek architecture. 2.5
Briefly describe the contribution of the Roman civilization to architectural building material. 2.5
Give a very brief architectural account of a Roman Villa. 2.5
What are the salient features of Early Chalukyan Temple Architecture? 2.5
Give a very brief account of Mahabodhi Temple established in 3rd Century. 2.5
List atleast 3 attributes for the survival of any civilization. 2.5
Very briefly mention the 3 main types of collapse. 2.5

questions.question_text: Elaborate the architectural principles and design of the Parthenon. Draw neat sketch.
Briefly describe the various architectural typology found in Greek Architecture. Support your answer through neat sketches.
Elaborate the architectural principles and design of the Pantheon.
Briefly describe the various architectural typology and types of buildings found in Roman Architecture. Support your answer through neat sketches.
Describe in detail the Durga Temple at Aihole.
What are structural temples? Describe the Lad Khan Temple at Aihole.
Explain the various factors & parameters in detail leading to the collapse of Roman Empire.
Explain the various factors & parameters in detail leading to the collapse of Mesopotamia Civilization.
